LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS COMPLAINANT FDC CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AGAINST RESTEC CONTRACTORS INC. IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 ON JANUARY 10, 2025, AT 9:30 A.M. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL REAL PROPERTY CASES PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. BOTH PARTIES TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B AND DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR RESPECTIVE FILINGS IN SUPPORT OF AND IN OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION TO DEPARTMENT 501 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE AND DEPARTMENT NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 30, 2024. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

SEPARATE STATEMENT OF FACTS IN SUPPORT OF ITS OPPOSITION TO MOTION FOR SUMMARY AJUDICATION (TRANSACTION ID # 75161801) FILED BY CROSS DEFENDANT RESTEC CONTRACTORS INC.
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-10-25 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AGAINST RESTEC CONTRACTORS INC. IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SHIFT ITS BURDEN. NO EVIDENCE PROVIDED THAT ANY CLAIMS "ARISING OUT OF OR RESULTING FROM PERFORMANCE OF THE SUBCONTRACTOR'S WORK" ARE BROUGHT AGAINST THE INDEMNITEE. SEE SEPARATE STATEMENT INCLUDING 6 FACTS (AND SUPPORTING EVIDENCE) NONE OF WHICH ADDRESSES THE "SUBCONTRACTOR'S WORK," A CAPITALIZED TERM IN THE RELIED-UPON INDEMNIFICATION CLAUSE. LATE-FILED OPPOSITION IS STRICKEN. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B) JUDGE: CHARLES F, HAINES ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-26-2025 IN 206, DEFENDANTS/CROSS-COMPLAINANTS BAKER PLACES, INC. AND BAKER PLACES GROVE STREET, LLC'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE AND ALL RELATED PRE-TRIAL DATES AND DEADLINES WAS HEARD. MARK FENSKE, ESQ. APPEARING FOR MOVING PARTIES. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 06/16/25 IS CONTINUED TO 04/06/26 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM PER STIPULATION. ALL DEADLINES TO TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Against Restec Contractors Inc.
Off Calendar Jan-10-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Zobida McCorquodale; 415-986-0688; Lorber Greenfield & Olsen, LLP; counsel for cross defendant/cross complainant FDC Construction, Inc. appearing via Zoom
Carlos Poza; 415-512-4381; Manning Gross + Massenburg LLP; appearing as counsel for cross defendant Restec Contractors Inc.

Ms. McCorquodale contests the courts tentative ruling and refers to fact# 1, the plaintiffs complaint, page 6, line 21 & 22. Discussed. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS COMPLAINANT FDC CONSTRUCTION, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Against Restec Contractors Inc. is DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden. No evidence provided that any claims "arising out of or resulting from performance of the Subcontractor's Work" are brought against the indemnitee. See Separate Statement including 6 facts (and supporting evidence) none of which addresses the "Subcontractor's Work," a capitalized term in the relied-upon indemnification clause. Late-filed opposition is stricken.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the court's tentative ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
Judge: Charles F, Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
